name: CMPLX-NVEST
purpose: Provide a domain-neutral investigate/NVest umbrella for wave, centroid, value, risk, error, failure, and success point diagnostics.

canonical_loop.seed: target identity, signal, or product context
canonical_loop.investigate: locate active value, error, risk, success, and failure points
canonical_loop.gate: delegate CQE E/G8 hidden-result gate decision
canonical_loop.bind: map result back to target identity and shared library
canonical_loop.receipt: emit diagnostic receipt and map update

required_honesty_layer.name: Hidden Guess Result
required_honesty_layer.rule: Every non-math NVEST diagnostic must guess before result reveal.

required_cqe_layer.rule: NVEST maps wave engine behavior to math/formal decomposition to product action to library binding before creating a new datum.
